# License FAQ

## Can I use this code for my personal projects?

Yes. AGPL-3.0 allows personal and educational use.

## Can I fork and modify this code?

Yes, but your modifications must also be licensed under AGPL-3.0.

## Can I use this in my company's product or SaaS?

Only if you release your entire product's source code under AGPL-3.0.
For closed-source commercial use, contact prathamesh.p9594@gmail.com for a commercial license.

## Can I use this for academic research?

Yes, with proper attribution to the original author and repository.

## Can I use the knowledge base data separately?

Third-party legal texts (GDPR, BDSG, TTDSG) are public law and freely usable.
EDPB guidelines follow the EDPB reuse policy.
The chunking, embedding, and retrieval logic is covered by AGPL-3.0.
